Work With Us
Redondo Beach, CA

Carpal Tunnel Syndrome Treatment in Redondo Beach

Tingling, numbness, and pain in your hand don't have to be your new normal.

Understanding the Condition

What Is Carpal Tunnel Syndrome?

The carpal tunnel is a narrow passageway near your wrist where your finger tendons and the median nerve travel through together. When the tissues inside that tunnel become inflamed — often from repetitive gripping, sustained wrist positions, or overuse — they press on the median nerve.

That pressure is what causes the characteristic symptoms: numbness and tingling in the thumb, index, middle, and part of the ring finger, nighttime hand numbness that wakes you up, the urge to shake your hand to restore feeling, and over time, weakening grip strength.

Left untreated, carpal tunnel syndrome can worsen and may require surgery. Caught early and treated conservatively, most patients can avoid that outcome entirely.

Who Gets Carpal Tunnel Syndrome?

It's More Common Than You Think

CTS affects a wide range of people — not just office workers.

Desk Workers & Typists
Rock Climbers
Musicians
Parents & Caregivers
Construction & Trade Workers
Cyclists
Pregnant Women
Post-Surgical Patients
Hairstylists & Aestheticians
Healthcare Workers
Warehouse & Logistics Workers
Athletes & Weekend Warriors
Our Approach

Personalized Carpal Tunnel Treatment

Every treatment plan starts with a thorough evaluation to understand your specific symptoms, contributing factors, and functional goals. From there, Jade builds an individualized program that may include:

  • ✓ Custom wrist splinting to offload the nerve at night and during activity
  • ✓ Nerve and tendon gliding exercises to improve mobility and reduce compression
  • ✓ Activity modification and ergonomic guidance
  • ✓ Manual therapy and soft tissue mobilization
  • ✓ Strengthening and return-to-function programming

Every session is one-on-one with Jade — no aides, no shared appointments. Just focused, expert care.
